title: Rodent Proofing in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn | $500-$3,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional rodent proofing services in Dyker Heights, Brooklyn. Protect your home from mice and rats with expert sealing and exclusion. $500-$3,000. Free inspection!
intro: Dyker Heights homeowners deserve comprehensive rodent protection for their beautiful residential properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert rodent proofing services that seal entry points, eliminate access routes, and keep mice and rats out permanently. Our proven exclusion methods protect your Dyker Heights home year-round.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Dyker Heights families, we understand the unique rodent challenges facing this Brooklyn neighborhood's detached homes and multi-family buildings. Our licensed technicians use premium materials and guaranteed workmanship to deliver long-lasting rodent proofing solutions tailored to your property's specific vulnerabilities.
localContext: Dyker Heights' mix of single-family homes, many with basements and garages, along with proximity to parks and commercial corridors, creates multiple rodent entry opportunities. From the charming tree-lined streets near Dyker Beach Park to properties along 13th Avenue, we've rodent-proofed hundreds of homes throughout this beloved Brooklyn neighborhood famous for its holiday lights.

faqs.question: What does rodent proofing include in Dyker Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Our rodent proofing service includes a complete exterior inspection, sealing all entry points with steel wool and caulk, installing door sweeps, covering vents with hardware cloth, sealing gaps around pipes and utilities, and addressing foundation cracks. We focus on the basement, garage, and exterior vulnerabilities common in Dyker Heights homes.

faqs.question: How much does rodent proofing cost in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: Rodent proofing in Dyker Heights typically ranges from $500 to $3,000 depending on your home's size, the number of entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand exactly what's included before we begin work.

faqs.question: How long does rodent proofing last?
faqs.answer: Professional rodent proofing using quality materials typically lasts 5-10 years or longer when properly maintained. We use durable, weather-resistant materials designed to withstand Brooklyn's climate. All our rodent proofing work comes with a warranty, and we offer annual inspection services to ensure continued protection.

faqs.question: Will rodent proofing work if I already have mice or rats?
faqs.answer: Rodent proofing is most effective after active infestations are eliminated through trapping or baiting. We recommend combining rodent removal services with proofing for complete protection. Our team will assess your situation during the free inspection and create a comprehensive plan to remove existing rodents and prevent future entry into your Dyker Heights home.
